By listening to customers and taking action, we have improved traffic and strengthened our value & affordability scores.

menu innovation, and compelling marketing that continue to bring customers through our doors

partly offset by higher Selling, general, and administrative expenses

notes: Reviewed all 59 events in order (8-K, 10-Q, 10-K, transcripts) plus 5 fiscal.ai KPIs; quotes verified verbatim against source content (unicode apostrophes preserved).

fiscal.ai KPI 'Global Comparable Sales Growth' folded into same_store_sales and 'Systemwide Sales Growth' folded into systemwide_sales (deduped within MCD; event evidence kept as stronger provenance).

Skipped as vague/unsupported or folded (14): weather speculation, gas-price negated mention, generic brand-perception risk factor, property_sale_gains line item, Russia business sale charges (single divestiture; charge classes covered by restructuring/impairment), impaired-software write-off (folded into impairment_charges), store-level/franchisee margins (folded into company_operated_margins), middle-income cohort traffic (folded into low_income_consumer_traffic), individual product promos (Grimace/Minecraft/snack wrap/McRib/Chicken Big Mac folded into marketing_campaigns and menu_innovation), franchisee support investments, operating_income result (covered by eps/revenue surprise plus margin drivers), 'Accelerating the Arches' strategy (program label, not a causal variable), plus the 2 KPI folds above.
eps_surprise/revenue_surprise use the earnings convention; quotes are the reported results from the earnings 8-K (no consensus text in sources).
leap_day_comparison flagged as borderline (calendar-comparison class, recurring every 4 years; not a period token) - reconcile may skip.
